title: Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The model uses selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and persistent GPU kernel runtime to optimize inference speed.
writeup: The video covers MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. It focuses on the inference optimizations behind that throughput: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime. The takeaway is that the speed comes from a combination of sparse expert routing and runtime-level techniques rather than raw hardware scaling.
